description:
The security team requires a new application server to be monitored in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081). Add the server 'APP-SERVER-01' to the Server Audit configuration and enable the following audit categories: Logon Activity, Object Access, and Privilege Use. If 'APP-SERVER-01' cannot be resolved on the network, proceed with adding the configuration entry.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin@2024
